siteDescription: A simple and efficient Pomodoro timer
timerSubtitle: Focus for 25 minutes, track every Pomodoro
dataSectionHint: Export a backup or restore from a file
importConfirm: Import will replace all current data. Continue?
importErrorInvalidJson: Invalid file. Please select a valid JSON backup.
importErrorInvalidFormat: Backup data is incomplete or malformed
syncUploadErrorSub: Data is saved locally. Check your network and refresh.
syncPullErrorSub: Using local data. Check your network and refresh.
weeklyCompleteSub: Congratulations, you completed this week's goal
notificationNeedHttps: Notifications require HTTPS, current connection is insecure
notificationDenied: Notification permission denied, please re-enable in browser settings
statsSubtitle: Track weekly, monthly, and yearly goals
noPomodoros: No completed Pomodoros on this day
landing_title: Tomato Clock - Focus starts with one Pomodoro
landing_description: A simple and efficient Pomodoro timer. 25-minute focus sessions to beat procrastination and boost productivity. Cross-platform sync supported.
landing_hero_desc1: A simple and efficient Pomodoro timer.
landing_hero_desc2: 25-minute focus sessions to beat procrastination and boost productivity.
landing_why_sub: Focus is a scarce resource — manage your attention scientifically
landing_card1_desc: In an age of fragmented information, attention is constantly disrupted. 25-minute focus sessions help break down complex tasks and lower the mental barrier.
landing_card2_desc: Long work hours lead to accumulated fatigue and diminishing efficiency. Work-rest cycles keep you at peak performance all day.
landing_card3_desc: Don't know how productive you've really been? Automatically record every completed Pomodoro and quantify your focus output.
landing_steps_sub: So simple there's nothing to learn — just open and use
landing_step1_desc: No download or installation needed. Works right in your browser. macOS client optional.
landing_step2_desc: Click start, enter a 25-minute immersive focus session. Automatically recorded when finished.
landing_step3_desc: View the calendar heatmap and stats to track your focus growth journey.
landing_cta_sub: No registration, works instantly. Improve a little every day.
landing_footer: Built with focus. Open source on GitHub.
authAccountHint: Sign in to sync your data to the cloud
authLoginSub: Sign in to sync your pomodoro records
authRegisterSub: Create an account — verify your email to sign in
authForgotSub: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link
authLoginLink: Already have an account? Sign in
authErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
authRegisterCheckEmail: Sign up successful. Check your email to verify.
authResetEmailSent: Reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
authInvalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Use the same credentials from registration.
authEmailNotConfirmed: Email not verified. Check your inbox for the confirmation link.
authCallbackFailedSub: The link may have expired or been consumed by your email client. Try signing in or register again.
authCallbackNoSession: Could not complete sign-in. The verification link may be invalid.
authInvalidCredentialsHint: If you registered multiple times, use your latest password or reset via Forgot password.
authEmailRateLimit: Too many emails sent. Please try again later.
authEmailRateLimitHint: Supabase built-in email is limited to ~2 per hour. Wait about 1 hour, or reset the user's password manually in Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users.
authEmailSendFailedHint: Verify sender domain keepgoing2049.cn in Resend (Domains → add DNS records). For testing, use onboarding@resend.dev in Supabase SMTP (sends only to your Resend account email).
